prompt: Based on the uploaded portrait photo, please generate a 16:9 ratio image of a "Korean dating reality show. I am SOLO, first appearance scene." The most important goal: Please maintain the actual facial identity of the uploaded person as much as possible. Face shape, feature proportions, eyes, nose, lips, jawline, skin tone, hairline, hair length, and overall impression must be preserved. Please include the cute name of the attached person. Do not beautify them into someone else or change them into an idol or influencer's face. They must look naturally like the same person. Scene concept: Please direct it like a broadcast still cut where a participant first appears in a Korean dating reality show. Make it look natural and realistic, like a broadcast capture shot with a real camera. To prevent it from looking composite, consistently match the lighting direction, color temperature, lens feel, shadows, skin texture, noise, and depth of field of the person and the background.
